schema_doc: phase-18.1 + phase-20.1 + phase-22.1 agent topology inventory. Each node: {id, name, layer, model, provider, role, file, parents, children, kind, gemini_locked?, grounding_dependent?}. Layers: 1=Gemini analysis pipeline, 2=MAS in-app Claude agents, 3=Harness MAS (Main+Researcher+QA), 4=Services/meta-evolution. Kinds: harness, in_app, skill, service, meta_evolution. v2 adds workflow_steps + workflow_edges describing the production daily-cycle (autonomous_loop.run_daily_cycle). v3 adds per-node gemini_locked (cannot run on Claude -- Vertex AI Search dep) and grounding_dependent (loses live web-search citations on Claude but still produces analysis text). 21 of 28 Layer-1 skills are fully swappable; the API endpoint also injects a live_model field per node from resolve_model() so the UI shows the operator's actual runtime model.

workflow_steps.name: Screen universe
workflow_steps.summary: Rank ~50 candidates from price+volume signals (no LLM).

workflow_steps.name: Analyze candidates
workflow_steps.summary: Layer-1 Gemini enrichment pipeline (~28 skill agents) on top-N tickers.

workflow_steps.name: Re-eval holdings
workflow_steps.summary: Re-run analysis on positions held >= reeval_frequency_days.

workflow_steps.name: Decide trades
workflow_steps.summary: Layer-2 MAS: planner + analyst + risk_judge produce structured BUY/SELL/HOLD.

workflow_steps.name: Mark to market
workflow_steps.summary: Update position NAV from latest quote.

workflow_steps.name: Save snapshot
workflow_steps.summary: Persist daily portfolio snapshot to BQ.

workflow_steps.name: Learn from outcomes
workflow_steps.summary: Reflect on closed trades; LLM writes lessons to agent_memories.

nodes.name: Main (this Claude Code session)
nodes.role: Coordinates harness cycles. Spawns researcher and qa subagents. Writes contract/results/log files.

nodes.name: Researcher
nodes.role: Combined external literature + internal codebase researcher. Writes research-gate brief before each PLAN.

nodes.name: Q/A
nodes.role: Deterministic checks + LLM judgment after every GENERATE. Writes evaluator_critique.md with PASS/CONDITIONAL/FAIL verdict.

nodes.name: MultiAgentOrchestrator
nodes.role: Layer-2 MAS orchestrator. Routes tasks to in-app Claude agents and aggregates results.

nodes.name: PlannerAgent
nodes.role: Generates trade plans from analysis pipeline output. Outputs structured BUY/SELL/HOLD with conviction.

nodes.name: EvaluatorAgent
nodes.role: Backtests proposed trade plans against historical regimes. Returns Sharpe/DSR/PBO metrics.

nodes.name: CommunicationAgent
nodes.role: Drafts user-facing summaries from raw analysis output. Slack-format aware.

nodes.name: AnalystAgent
nodes.role: Synthesizes Layer-1 outputs. Cross-references debate winners with macro context.

nodes.name: ModeratorAgent (debate)
nodes.role: Adjudicates Bull vs Bear debate rounds. Picks the stronger argument.

nodes.name: SynthesisAgent
nodes.role: Combines all Layer-1 enrichment outputs into a single decision-ready synthesis.

nodes.name: Layer 1 Analysis Pipeline (28 skills)
nodes.role: 15-step Gemini enrichment pipeline. Bulls/Bears, Devil's Advocate, Bias Detector, Risk Judge, etc. Defaults collapsed in the visualization.

nodes.name: BullAgent
nodes.role: Builds the bullish case for a ticker.

nodes.name: BearAgent
nodes.role: Builds the bearish case for a ticker.

nodes.name: DevilsAdvocateAgent
nodes.role: Challenges synthesis output. Forces consideration of contrary evidence.

nodes.name: BiasDetector (skill)
nodes.role: Flags cognitive biases in analysis output (anchoring, recency, confirmation).

nodes.name: RiskJudge
nodes.role: Position-sizing recommendation. Outputs pct-of-NAV with rationale.

nodes.name: RAGAgent
nodes.role: Retrieval-augmented generation against agent_memories BQ table (BM25).
nodes.lock_reason: Vertex AI Search tool dependency at orchestrator.py:365-405 -- cannot route through make_client().

nodes.name: EarningsToneAgent
nodes.role: Sentiment analysis on earnings calls and 10-K MD&A sections.

nodes.name: NLPSentimentAgent
nodes.role: News headline + body sentiment via FinBERT or LLM.

nodes.name: SocialSentimentAgent
nodes.role: Reddit/Twitter sentiment + volume signals.

nodes.name: InsiderAgent
nodes.role: SEC Form 4 insider buy/sell pattern analysis.

nodes.name: OptionsAgent
nodes.role: Options flow + IV skew + max-pain signals.

nodes.name: PatentAgent
nodes.role: USPTO patent activity + R&D trend signals.

nodes.name: CompetitorAgent
nodes.role: Competitive positioning + market-share trend analysis.

nodes.name: SupplyChainAgent
nodes.role: Supplier/customer concentration + geopolitical exposure.

nodes.name: AltDataAgent
nodes.role: Alternative data: ETF flows, satellite imagery proxies, app downloads.

nodes.name: AnomalyAgent
nodes.role: Statistical anomaly detection on price + volume + fundamentals.

nodes.name: SectorAnalysisAgent
nodes.role: Sector rotation + relative strength analysis.

nodes.name: SectorCatalystAgent
nodes.role: Upcoming sector catalysts (regulation, conferences, earnings clusters).

nodes.name: EnhancedMacroAgent
nodes.role: FRED macro indicators + regime classification (risk-on/off).

nodes.name: ScenarioAgent
nodes.role: Bull/base/bear scenario probability weighting.

nodes.name: InfoGapAgent
nodes.role: Identifies missing data that would change conviction.

nodes.name: DeepDiveAgent
nodes.role: Long-form fundamental + technical analysis.

nodes.name: CriticAgent
nodes.role: Reviews synthesis for logical gaps before final commit.

nodes.name: MarketAgent
nodes.role: Market-internals: breadth, VIX, sector dispersion.

nodes.name: QuantModelAgent
nodes.role: ML model output (XGBoost barrier classifier) + feature importance.

nodes.name: QuantStrategy
nodes.role: Strategy selection: triple-barrier vs mean-reversion vs momentum.

nodes.name: AggressiveAnalyst
nodes.role: High-conviction risk-on perspective.

nodes.name: ConservativeAnalyst
nodes.role: Capital-preservation risk-off perspective.

nodes.name: NeutralAnalyst
nodes.role: Balanced perspective, weights both scenarios.

nodes.name: AutonomousLoop
nodes.role: Daily cycle: Screen -> Analyze -> Decide -> Trade -> Snapshot -> Learn. APScheduler-driven.

nodes.name: PaperTrader
nodes.role: Virtual trade execution backed by BigQuery + Alpaca paper. No real money.

nodes.name: ExecutionRouter
nodes.role: Routes orders bq_sim / alpaca_paper / shadow modes. Max-notional clamp + live-key guard.

nodes.name: PortfolioManager
nodes.role: Sell-first-then-buy. Risk Judge position sizing. Coordinates with PaperTrader.

nodes.name: OutcomeTracker
nodes.role: Evaluates past recommendations vs actuals (7/30/90/180/365 day windows). LLM reflection -> agent_memories BQ.

nodes.name: CycleHealth
nodes.role: Monitors autonomous_loop cycle execution. 7-band health classification.

nodes.name: KillSwitch
nodes.role: Operator panic button. Pauses paper trading + cancels open orders.

nodes.name: PaperGoLiveGate
nodes.role: 5-criteria readiness gate before any paper -> live transition.

nodes.name: SkillOptimizer
nodes.role: Proposes edits to skill prompts via LLM reflection on outcomes.

nodes.name: AlpacaBroker
nodes.role: BrokerClient(abc.ABC) implementation for Alpaca paper. Wraps alpaca-py TradingClient.

nodes.name: MetaEvolutionCron
nodes.role: Weekly Sunday 02:00 ET APScheduler entry. Dispatches cron_allocator + provider_rebalancer + alpha_velocity.

nodes.name: CronAllocator
nodes.role: WFQ allocation of 15 daily Claude routine slots across cron jobs.

nodes.name: ProviderRebalancer
nodes.role: WFQ + max-min progressive-fill USD allocation across LLM providers (anthropic/google/openai/github).

nodes.name: AlphaVelocity
nodes.role: Sharpe delta over rolling window. Persisted to alpha_velocity_samples BQ table.

nodes.name: ArchetypeLibrary
nodes.role: Strategy archetype lookup (frozen dataclass). triple-barrier, mean-reversion, momentum, etc.

nodes.name: DirectiveRewriter
nodes.role: Proposes rewrites to .claude/agents/researcher.md based on recent brief signals.

nodes.name: DirectiveReview
nodes.role: Independent 5-dim judge gate (clarity/alignment/safety/proportionality/factuality) on directive proposals. Fail-CLOSED.

nodes.name: SlackBot
nodes.role: Bolt + Socket Mode. Slash commands /analyze /portfolio /report. Morning digest.
